name: heatmap
prompt:
Analyze this L2 market depth heatmap/surface visualization. Extract the visible price bands and their intensity.

Return a JSON object with this exact structure:
{
  "symbol": "detected symbol or null",
  "displayType": "heatmap",
  "priceRange": {"min": 100.0, "max": 102.0},
  "bands": [{"price": 100.5, "intensity": "high|medium|low", "side": "bid|ask"}, ...],
  "confidence": "high|medium|low",
  "notes": "any observations"
}

Rules:
- Extract price ranges and relative intensity of visible bands
- Identify bid-side (typically green/warm) vs ask-side (typically red/cool)
- Return ONLY the JSON object, no other text
